tool_input.old_string:
model Referral {
  id           Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  referrerId   Int?
  refereeId    Int?
  referralCode String    @unique
  status       String    @default("pending")
  rewardApplied Boolean  @default(false)
  createdAt    DateTime  @default(now())

  @@map("referrals")
}
tool_input.new_string:
model Referral {
  id           Int       @id @default(autoincrement())
  referrerId   Int?
  refereeId    Int?
  referralCode String    @unique
  status       String    @default("pending")
  rewardApplied Boolean  @default(false)
  createdAt    DateTime  @default(now())

  @@map("referrals")
}

model AuditLog {
  id           Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  userId       Int
  restaurantId Int
  action       String   // CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE, RESTORE
  entityType   String   // ingredient, recipe, supplier, inventory, order
  entityId     Int
  changes      Json?    // { field: { old: value, new: value } }
  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())

  @@index([restaurantId, createdAt])
  @@index([entityType, entityId])
  @@map("audit_logs")
}

tool_input.content:
-- Add audit_logs table for tracking all entity changes
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS "audit_logs" (
  "id" SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  "userId" INTEGER NOT NULL,
  "restaurantId" INTEGER NOT NULL,
  "action" TEXT NOT NULL,
  "entityType" TEXT NOT NULL,
  "entityId" INTEGER NOT NULL,
  "changes" JSONB,
  "createdAt" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

-- Indexes for efficient querying
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "audit_logs_restaurantId_createdAt_idx" ON "audit_logs" ("restaurantId", "createdAt");
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS "audit_logs_entityType_entityId_idx" ON "audit_logs" ("entityType", "entityId");

tool_input.prompt:
Add loading states, tooltips, and keyboard shortcuts to RestauMargin. Project at C:\Users\mrgue\CLAUDE CODE\restaurant-margin.

**FIX 1 â€” Re-enable CommandPalette and AlertsBell (HIGH)**
Read client/src/App.tsx. The imports for CommandPalette and AlertsBell are commented out (lines 10-11). The components exist in client/src/components/. 

- Uncomment the imports
- Uncomment the JSX where they're rendered (search for "CommandPalette" and "AlertsBell")
- Make sure AlertsBell is NOT wrapped in a conditional `{!collapsed && ...}` â€” render it directly
- Make sure CommandPalette is rendered at the top level

**FIX 2 â€” Keyboard Shortcuts Help Modal**
Create client/src/components/ShortcutsModal.tsx:
- Triggered by pressing "?" key
- Shows a modal with all available shortcuts:
  - Ctrl+K: Recherche rapide
  - ?: Raccourcis clavier
  - G D: Aller au Dashboard
  - G R: Aller aux Recettes
  - G I: Aller aux IngrÃ©dients
  - G F: Aller aux Fournisseurs
  - G P: Aller au Planning
  - N: Nouveau (dans la page active)
  - ESC: Fermer modal/popup
- Style: monochrome W&B theme, modal with backdrop blur

Add ShortcutsModal to App.tsx.

**FIX 3 â€” Loading Skeletons**
Create client/src/components/Skeleton.tsx:
- Simple skeleton loader component with pulse animation
- Variants: SkeletonCard, SkeletonTable, SkeletonText
- Used as fallback during data loading

Style:
```tsx
<div className="animate-pulse bg-[#E5E7EB] dark:bg-[#1A1A1A] rounded-lg h-4 w-full" />
```

**IMPORTANT:** The CommandPalette and AlertsBell re-enable is the most important part. Be careful not to recreate the `{!collapsed && {/* */}}` bug that caused React error #31.

Add SEO improvements to RestauMargin public pages. Project at C:\Users\mrgue\CLAUDE CODE\restaurant-margin.

**Read first:**
- client/index.html
- client/src/pages/Landing.tsx
- client/src/pages/BlogCalcMarge.tsx
- client/src/pages/FoodCostCalculator.tsx
- client/src/pages/Pricing.tsx
- client/public/sitemap.xml (if exists)

**FIX 1 â€” Meta Tags**
In client/index.html, update:
- <title>RestauMargin â€” Gestion de marge et fiches techniques pour restaurants</title>
- <meta name="description" content="Logiciel de gestion de marge restaurant. Calculez votre food cost, optimisez vos fiches techniques et augmentez vos marges avec l'IA.">
- <meta name="keywords" content="marge restaurant, food cost, fiche technique, gestion restaurant, calcul marge, coefficient multiplicateur">
- Add Open Graph tags: og:title, og:description, og:image, og:url, og:type
- Add Twitter card tags: twitter:card, twitter:title, twitter:description

**FIX 2 â€” Structured Data (JSON-LD)**
In client/index.html, add JSON-LD for:
- SoftwareApplication schema (name, url, applicationCategory, offers)
- Organization schema (name, url, logo)

In Landing.tsx, verify/add:
- FAQPage schema for the FAQ section

In BlogCalcMarge.tsx, add:
- Article schema (headline, author, datePublished, image)

**FIX 3 â€” Sitemap**
Create/update client/public/sitemap.xml with ALL public routes:
- / (landing)
- /login
- /pricing
- /outils/calculateur-food-cost
- /outils/generateur-qr-menu
- /blog/calcul-marge-restaurant
- /mentions-legales, /cgv, /cgu, /politique-confidentialite
- /dev-corp
- /station-produit

```
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /dashboard
Disallow: /recipes
Disallow: /ingredients
Disallow: /settings
Disallow: /api/

```

**IMPORTANT:** Only modify public pages. Don't touch authenticated app pages.

model NewsItem {
  id            Int         @id @default(autoincrement())
  restaurantId  Int?
  title         String
  content       String
  type          String
  priority      String      @default("normal")
  dismissed     Boolean     @default(false)
  mercurialeRef String?
  createdAt     DateTime    @default(now())
  restaurant    Restaurant? @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([restaurantId, dismissed])
  @@map("news_items")
}
tool_input.new_string:
model NewsItem {
  id            Int         @id @default(autoincrement())
  restaurantId  Int?
  title         String
  content       String
  type          String
  priority      String      @default("normal")
  dismissed     Boolean     @default(false)
  mercurialeRef String?
  createdAt     DateTime    @default(now())
  restaurant    Restaurant? @relation(fields: [restaurantId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)

  @@index([restaurantId, dismissed])
  @@map("news_items")
}

model NewsletterSubscriber {
  id           Int      @id @default(autoincrement())
  email        String   @unique
  subscribedAt DateTime @default(now())
  unsubscribed Boolean  @default(false)

  @@map("newsletter_subscribers")
}
